name: Zoledronic Acid Injection
about: Zoledronic Acid Injection is a drug type injection that is used to treat high levels of calcium in the blood caused by cancer. It helps in slowing down the bone damage and reduces the risk of fractures in people with cancer that has spread to the bones. This injection is a liquid and should be stored in a cool place. The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. This medicine is manufactured in India and is highly effective in treating cancer-related bone problems.

faq.q: What is Zoledronic Acid Injection used for?
faq.a: Zoledronic Acid Injection is used to treat high levels of calcium in the blood caused by cancer. It helps in slowing down the bone damage and reduces the risk of fractures in people with cancer that has spread to the bones.

faq.q: How should I store Zoledronic Acid Injection?
faq.a: Zoledronic Acid Injection should be stored in a cool place.

faq.q: What is the physical form of Zoledronic Acid Injection?
faq.a: Zoledronic Acid Injection is a liquid.

faq.q: Who can take Zoledronic Acid Injection?
faq.a: Zoledronic Acid Injection should only be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: Is Zoledronic Acid Injection manufactured in India?
faq.a: Yes, Zoledronic Acid Injection is manufactured in India.
